contributing_factors.description: 147 correctable ECC errors in last 24h (threshold: 50). Rapid escalation from baseline of 2-3/day.
Memory bandwidth degraded 18.2% vs 30-day rolling average — consistent with DRAM row hammer or module fault.
CPU package temperature peaked at 88°C (3°C over threshold) during last compute burst.
3 DIMM POST errors logged in BMC SEL since last reboot (2026-02-25).

recommended_action: Drain node042 immediately and schedule memory module inspection. Replace DIMM slot 4B (highest ECC error density per IPMI sensor).
